titleStmt.title: SII 18.299: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 299. CHAUḌADĀNPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Muktēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is a composite record of two grants of land and refers to the rule of Āhavāditya Vikramāditya over Banavāse-nāḍu. Of the two grants, one made by Khaṇḍeyakāṟa Kāmeya, the subordinate of Vikramāditya, is dated in Śaka 1113, Virōdhikṛit, Mārgaśira Amāvāsyā, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1191 December 18. The week-day was Wednesday. The gift, meant for the worship and offerings of god Muktēśvara and for the repairs to the temple, was entrusted to Muktajīya.

The second grant, made by Vikramāditya himself, in the presence of the mahājanas of Gōpe was made a month later, i.e., Virōdhikṛit, Puśhya Amāvāsyā, Thursday [Saṁkramaṇa], corresponding to A.D. 1192 January 16, Thursday. The saṁkramaṇa, however, did not occur on that day.
The record gives the genealogy of Vikramāditya and states that Vikramāditya of Ujjayini, whose descendants the Guttas claim to be, had acquired aśhṭamgāsiddhi. The genealogy of Kāmeya is also given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmuktēṣaṁ namō yasya jaṭājūṭē vidhauḥ kaḷāḥ tuṁgagaṁgānadītīra cā
rē haṁsīva rājatē padapiṁ muktēśvaraṁ māḷkabhimatasukhamaṁ bhakta
lōkakke bhaktyāspadacaṁdrōpēṁdravṛṁdārakasikaranutaśrīpadadvaṁdvanuddāmadaṣāsaṁ
bhūtabhūtipradanakhiḷa jagatsvāmi saṁbaddhagaurīhridayānaṁdaikakaṁ
daṁ viṣadatarayaśaḥ prāptasacchāṁsanākaṁ . vri . viṣadatarēśvarājñeyodaviṁ
© dame saṁbhavisirddavī caturddaṣabhuvanaṁgaḷaṣṭatanudharmmadanērmmadalliyuṁ manaḥkuṣa
lamanittu bhūbhuvanamābhuvanaṁgaḷanēḷikuṁ ramāvaṣarabhivāṁccheyiṁ salipa sa
tukritiyaṁ sale tōrppa nērppiniṁ . saptasamudrada baḷasiṁ saptadvīpapradēśadiṁ bhuvanaṁ
gaḷbyāptiyanuḷidīrēḷumavāptasukhāvaḷigaḷirddavenaliḷeyesaguṁ . dvīpāvaḷiyo
ḷjaṁbūdvīpave sogayikkuvalladaṁduḷidāṟuṁ dvīpaṁgaḷumaṁ poṟagaṇa kā
ṁpiṁgirisida vidhātranēnaṟiyadanē . Ive jaṁbūdvīpalakṣmīviḷasitalāva
ṇyameṁbante dēvadṛpūviṁ candanōrvvīruhada sovaḍiniṁ ratnabhūpāḷiyiṁ phēnavini vibaddhamā
dā teṟegaḷa niṟiyiṁ sanmahāmacchyapuṁcchāttavicitrōrupatradiṁ rājisi baḷasida lāvaṇya
vārāsi tōrkkuṁ . vāridhi tiḷigoḷanadaṟoḷnīrajadavolesegumalte jaṁbūdvīpaṁ mēruve ka
rṇnike dese yesaḷāraye balavarppa rāśicakraṁ bhramaraṁ . suragiriyiḷāvrittaṁ kiṁpuru
śaṁ harivarṣameseva himavadgiriyā bharatōrvvīṣaṭkhaṁḍaṁ tarataradiṁ teṁkalalli māḷavamesa
guṁ . tāvareyeṁdinippa kamaḷaṁgaḷe sālkema jātisaṁkaraṁ pūvinoḷakke nūtanakaragrahaṇaṁ
vivāhadalli tōrkkāvira veṁgadalsurabhiyaṁ kaṟeyaṁbaḍenippalakṣmi kāmāvaḷi rājanīti hridayasthiti
māḷavadoḷu virājikuṁ . māḷavadoḷagujjayaniye pāḷisuguṁ karṇapuṇyamaṁ kaṇbeḷagiṁ bāḷeya vō
sarise caṁdraśiḷālayamaṁ maḷeyanuḷidu baḷeya banaṁgaḷu . Amarddaṁ tatpuradoḷnri pōttamanenippā vikramā
dityanaṣṭamahāsiddhiyaneyde sādhisi jagakkānaṁdamāgittabhīṣṭamaniṁbiṁ śakanāgi mūjagamumaṁ satkīrttiyiṁ mucci
bhūramegiṁ taṁnneya tōḷabāḷe maṟuvāḷilleṁbinaṁ tāḷdutuṁ . Uguguṁ ratnāḷi gaḷkaṁtheyinesagikkumiṣṭānna
maṁ kharpparaṁ pāvugevoyguṁ pēḷdatāṇakkesapudasuvanaṁṭaṁṭu citrakkebettaṁ bagedāgaḷtīrccuguṁ śatṛvanasirasa
diṁ poṁgaḷakkuṁ paṭaṁ diṭṭigadriśyarakkeyakkuṁ ghuṭikeyasadaḷaṁ vikramādityapuṇyaṁ . Eneleseda vikramādi
tyanēnittalcaṁdraguptavaṁṣa doḷ dhaṁnyarjjaniyasarenipidanōḍisi janiyisidaṁ vīravikramādityanripaṁ . ©Read śa.
caritaṁgaṁ nītigaḷgaṁ ghanamenisuvuvāptartthigiṣṭārtthadiṁdaṁ piriduṁdacchauryya murbdīvaḷayada baḷasiṁda
ggaḷaṁ lakṣmisāmrājyaramāvistāradiṁdatyadhikamanuvinōdaṁ nējaṁgumāmūytubbara mā sa
tukīrtti lōkakkatuḷamenisidaṁ vikramādityadēvaṁ . Ā vīravikramādityāvanipaṁgudaya giri
yoḷudayisuvaṁ dinaśrīvaranene jommanripaṁ bhūvadhu kaṇdeṟeye puṭṭidaṁ kamaḷēśaṁ . vinatānaṁdana saṁ
gataṁ sajanitōdyatkāmavarṣapravarddhanaharṣaṁ vibudhāśrayastutapadaṁ śrīmaṁḍaḷā grāvaḷōkanarāgōdaya
nāsudarṣa(rśa)nakaraṁgāścaryarūpaṁ sujommaṁ nṛpaṁ rājisuttirppaniṁdradivasēṁ drōpēṁdraroṁdaṁdadiṁ . Ara
sarggilla rasapraśa(sa)kti rasikatvaṁ kūḍe kūrppilla kūrppire vidyāvaḷiyilla vidyeyire nērppillāge nērppilla saccaritaṁ podaḷdi
re viḷāsaprītiyilla guṇōtkaramellaṁ neredirddaveṁdenisidaṁ śrījōyidēvōrbdi paṁ . Ā jommananuja
guttaṁ rājācārapraśastiyaṁ kuvaḷeyalakṣmījāpyamaṁtraviḷasadbījākṣaramaṁ budhāḷi yindōdisuvaṁ . manasi
janōlagippesakadiṁ paḍedaṁ neṟekeṭṭameyyanītaninī va(vu)dghakīrtiyane vorddi hima dyuti tatkaḷaṁkavarttanamanadirppidaṁ
yamanumītana khaḷgadoḷippanalte bhōjanasukhadiṁdameṁdenipuduttamaguttanṛpāḷa vṛttakaṁ . Enisida gutta
bhūmipana vallabhe padmaladēvi jātipadminiyene lakṣmiyaṁ taḷedinaṁganurāgisi rājahaṁsa varttanadeḍeyāgi sēbya
kavicakrade saṁstuteyāgi kāmarājana jaladurggamaṁ rasaviśēṣavinōdadi māḍi rūḍhipaḷu . padmeya ni
rmaḷinōdarada padmadinī vīravikramaṁ puṭṭidanā padmabhavanante kriṣṇana padmōdaradalli puṭṭe nayavinutuṁṭē . vina
yaṁ vikramaśakti puṇyavenipī mūruṁ guṇaṁ rājyamaṁḍana dēhāṁśugaḷentenalsirige puṇyaṁ cēta
naṁ balpu meyvinayaṁ bhūṣaṇameṁdu ṣā straruci śastrābhyāsa dharmmapravarttanameṁ diṁtivu vīravikramanoḷirkkuṁRead śā.
prājyasāmrājyanoḷu . moneyoḷkhaḷgasahāyavrittitanagābriṁdaṁ narēṁdrāyatē yenisalsēnemanaṁ satatvame
yathā rūpaṁ tathā śīlaṁ yeṁdenisalkāvasukhaṁ yāviḷanetāṁ tējaḥphaḷaṁ rājyameṁde nesalvikramaśakti rājisu
gumiṁtī vikramādityanoḷu . jayavadhuvuṁ vormeyuṁ bayasutirppadaṭaṁganeya rvviḷāsadiṁ bayasu
va celvu nītitatigaḷnaḍeyalsupathaprapaṁcamaṁ bayasuva mārggavarttigaḷapēkṣegaḷaṁ baya suttavirppatipriya
venippārppu rājisuvinaṁ misupaṁ vibhu vīravikramaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁca mahāśabdama
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ujjayanīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ vaṭakalpavrikṣalāṁcchitavijayadhvajaṁ bhuvana rakṣa
ṇaikadakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍaṁcaṁdraguptānvayasudhārṇnavapūrṇnacaṁdraṁ vibhavā marēṁdraṁ
haracaraṇanakhakiraṇasāṁdracaṁdrikācakōraṁ gurupadapayōdharadhvānānaṁditama
yūraṁ māninīmānasarbbasvasūṟekāṟaṁ raṇadoḷnīṟaṁ maṇḍaḷikabhairavaṁ Ānaṁdita yuvatīna
yanakairavaṁ pannirbbaragaṇḍaṁ samaraṣau(śau)ṁḍaṁ Āhavādityaṁ vīravikramā tyaṁ banavāsenāḍaṁ
duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadi pāḷisuttaṁ guttavoḷala nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathā vinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . © Ā bhūpāḷapadābbabhṛṁganenipaṁ sadbhaktiyiṁ yuktiyiṁdā bhūpā
ḷana maṁtrayōgyanenipaṁ taṁnnudghavīratvadiṁdā bhūpāḷana dakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍaṁ nijaṁ
tānenalkā bhūpāḷana nāyakāgraṇi jagadvikhyātanī kāmeya . vacana . tadanvaya meṁtene . Attya
rasaṁ caṁdarasaṁ satyadakaṇiyenisi misupadharmmada dhuramaṁ nityōtsavadiṁ dhariyipa krittyaucitya
me samastaguṇavenalesedaru . tatsute mācaladēviya hritsarasarasīruhadoḷeseva rasamadhulaharī
prōtsukanenisi karagrahasatsukhamaṁ paḍedanaṁdu nāyaka māraṁ . māreyanāyakaṁge nutamā
calegaṁ janisirddu śaṁkarōdārapadābjabhṛṁganatimaṁgaḷacēṣṭitanaṁganājanakkī rativallabhaṁ janitaneṁbinaviṁbina
sadguṇaṁgaḷiṁdāru samānaviṁdamama nōḷpaḍe kāmeyanāyakāgryayanoḷu .
bhīmana balpiṁ negaḷdā rāmana sāhasadinaṇuvanina sadbhakti prēmadinādyanenippaṁ kāmeya
nudātta citracaritra . javadiṁ śrīvikramāṁkasthitipatitiḷakaṁ śatṛsēnāṁgamaṁ
tāṁ tavipalkudyōgamaṁ māḷpinegavatimadōccaṁḍavē(ṁ)daṁḍaṣaṁḍaṁ navavēgabhrāji
vājibrajavatibaḷapādatavennī kripāṇāhavadoḷmuṁtirddavinnēke ninage bhara(ya)veṁdeṁba nāḷvaṁge
kāmaṁ . Ā naranāthana viśayada dānajaḷaṁ kūḍiparidudeṁbavolurbbīmāniniya hāradaṁtire
tāneṁduṁ tuṁgabhadretaddēśadoḷaṁ bhūramaṇītaraḷada volīrēḷuṁ bhuvanaṁgaḷoḷage savitatamahi
mādhāraṁ muktēśvaranāmāraṁbhadenesavutirppanīśanumēśaṁ . © svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ
śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīravikramādityadēvarasaru guttevoḷala nela vīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīviyenipa khaṁḍeya
kāṟa kāmeyanāyakaṁ taṁna svāmiya cittamanupārjjisi pāritōṣikamāgi paḍeda honnava
ttiya holadoḷu cāmēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ mūḍalu gōpeya Ōṇiyiṁ teṁkalu caturāghā
ṭaśuddhamāgiralāṟu mattarumaṁ sakavarṣaṁ 1113 neya virōdhikritusaṁvatsarada mā
rggaśiradamāvāse sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīmanumuktēśvaradēvara Aṁgaraṁ
gabhōgakke jīrnōdhdhārakkeṁdu muktajīyara kālaṁkarcci dhāSome letters here are completely erased.
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa . © © © śrī viśvanāthāyanamaḥ . śrīmuktēśvarāya namaḥ
© Īṁtīdharmmava praśipāḷisa(si)davaru prayāgeyalargghyatīrtthavāraṇāśiyalu sāsira
© kavileyaṁ koṁḍuṁ(kōḍuṁ)koḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭisi nāsirbbaru vēda pāragarige koṭṭa phala . I dharmmava
nāvanānuṁ kiḍisidanā brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavileya hāpātakanakku . © svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō harēti vaśuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrā yatē krimiḥ . kabba
© virōdhikṛtusaṁvatsarada puśyadamavāse brihaspati pāta saṁkra kūḍidalli śrīmuktēśvaradēvara trikāla
dupahārake śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīravikramādityadēva gōpeya mahājanaṁgaḷa saṁnidhāna
dalu koṭṭa gadde śrīmadagrahāraṁ honavattiyahāḷa śrī kalidēvagaddeyiṁ teṁka Ā dēvariṁ mūḍa biṭṭa gaddekaṁba 20 . Intīdhdharmmavaṁ
tappade pratipāḷisuvudu . kaluhaṁdarādiyāgi hoṟatharasahita rēōjana kelasa . muktē svarāya namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
